message:
fix(runtime): explicit guard drops, pool timeout assertion, wheel cleanup

- blocking_pool.rs: add explicit drop(handles) after thread handle
  cleanup loop to release mutex before error-path logic
- sync/pool.rs: strengthen acquire_timeout test to verify total_wait_time
  is accounted in pool stats after timeout; use inline format args
- time/wheel.rs: replace map_or(true, |min| dist < min) with
  is_none_or(|min| dist < min) for clarity; rustfmt long expressions
- three_lane.rs: rustfmt long tuple destructuring in execute_task

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
